---
title: "Charles Sylvester Wooldridge"
---

## Charles Sylvester Wooldridge

**Dates:** 1859-1941

### Description

solicitor, son of Charles Wooldridge

### Biography

He graduated BA from St. John\'s College, Oxford in 1882.  He several times played rugby for England and has a biography at www.scrum.com.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
